reward_code:
def reward_fn(obs):
    # obs[0]=cos(th1), obs[2]=cos(th2)
    # Height is high when cos values are negative
    h1 = -obs[0]
    h2 = -obs[2]
    return h1 + h2
draft: Maximize height sum to push joints upward.

reward_code:
def reward_fn(obs):
    height = -obs[0] - obs[2]
    # Pump energy if we are low
    velocity_bonus = 0.1 * (abs(obs[4]) + abs(obs[5])) if height < 1.0 else 0.0
    return height + velocity_bonus
draft: Reward angular velocity when below goal to build momentum.

reward_code:
def reward_fn(obs):
    height = -obs[0] - obs[2]
    # obs[2] is cos of joint 2 relative to joint 1 usually
    folding_penalty = 0.5 * abs(obs[3]) # Penalize sin of joint 2
    return height - folding_penalty
draft: Reward height but penalize extreme joint folding.
